description: The coverage universe for the NonEmpty<ConsumerHook> keystone (consumer-presence + runtime-witness gates). Every declaration kind is enumerated here with HOW its consumers are witnessed. The runtime-witness gate PROJECTS its coverage from this register (the 548 §5.2 / execution-surface pattern): a kind that appears in the registry snapshot but is absent here fails (unregistered-kind), and a kind declared staticCatalog=POPULATED that produces zero snapshot entries fails (missing-populated-kind). So a NEW declaration kind cannot silently escape the keystone — it must be registered here, declaring its witness channel.

witnessChannels.AGENT_OFFERING: Witnessed by the real AgentOperationEmitter (prompt-construction): the declared agent-loop consumer must equal what the model's tool list actually offers (bidirectional).
witnessChannels.FE_WIRE: Witnessed by wire-delivery: the declaration is served on its /api/registry/<kind> endpoint that the FE catalog client boots.
witnessChannels.INLINE_ONLY: Inline-only ConsumerDeclaring kind: NonEmpty<ConsumerHook> is UNREPRESENTABLE at construction (Phase 0.2) — a zero-consumer instance cannot be built, so no runtime witness is needed beyond construction.

kinds.note: Core + agent-tools operation catalogs; bidirectional declared<->delivered against the emitter.
Surface-derived + inline consumers; served on the endpoint the FE ResourceCatalogClient boots.
Inline-only; NonEmpty unrepresentable. Static PromptCatalog is empty today.
Inline-only; NonEmpty unrepresentable. The demo workflow declares workflow-shape-runner.
Inline-only; NonEmpty unrepresentable. Plugins are runtime (MCP-host / loader), not in the static snapshot.
Manifest tier; consumers are inverse (a surface consumes resources/operations). Not yet emitted into the snapshot.
Registers an intent ingress; consumed by the per-process IntentRouter.
